philosophy: Make the dashboard feel operational and action-oriented without turning it into a noisy command center.

typography.fontFamily: "DIN Alternate", "Source Han Sans SC", "PingFang SC", sans-serif
typography.caption: 12px/1.45/500

components.hero: Hero should look like a mission status board with metric emphasis.
components.kpiCard: Cards may use stronger colored top bars or side accents.
components.list: Prioritize row scannability and alarm-state recognition.
components.detail: Keep status, SLA and next action visible above the fold.
components.form: Use section dividers and completion hints to reduce friction.
components.timeline: Highlight bottlenecks and delayed nodes with status color.

banned: dense full-width tables with no breathing room
